summary: Backend-only Task 8 validation completed. Core evaluator metrics and full regression suite passed.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for Task 8 scope.
critical_code_review_comments: compute_cdl uses strict window-based detection over post-switch trajectory only; no single-step trigger logic exists.
compute_pr correctly computes perseveration using only post-switch incorrect steps and compares actions to pre-change ShiftRule outputs.
Validation remains explicit/deterministic: empty trajectory, length mismatch, incoherent step ordering, and invalid window parameter guards are implemented in core_metrics.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests/test_core_metrics.py -v (12/12 pass) and pytest /app/tests -v --tb=short with JUnit XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results_iteration9.xml (64/64 pass). No mocked APIs used.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration. Requested Task 8 behaviors are validated by passing metric-specific tests and full regression run.
